calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Determining The Claim Of Exemption Filed By Non-Debtor Spouse Svetlana Moskalets; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jessica Taran
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jessica Taran (jtaran@jtaranlaw.com) for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor.
Paul Cass (casslaws@aol.com) for and with non-party spouse, Svetlana Moskalets.
Russian Interpreter: Tatiana Iacona.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALEX MIRETSKY's Motion For An Order Determining The Claim Of Exemption Filed By Non-Debtor Spouse Svetlana Moskalets:

The claim of exemption is sustained, and the funds levied upon are ordered returned to Ms. Moskalets.

[see word minutes for details.]

order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing For Plaintiff Alex Miretsky D/B/A Russian Imports Request For Court Default Judgment Against Pavel (A/K/A Paul) Moskalets, Individually, And Pavel (A/K/A Paul) D/B/A Mnm Food Store, And Pavel (A/K/A Paul) Moskalets D/B/A Good Neighbor, Formerly Good Neighbor European Deli, Llc, Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 585(D)
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, individually, Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba MNM Food Market and Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba Good Neighbor, f/k/a Good Neighbor Eurpoean Deli Market, LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jessica Taran, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alex Miretsky, dba Russian Import, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Taran and Mr. Miretsky appeared for this morning's hearing via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendants Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, individually, Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba MNM Food Market or Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba Good Neighbor, f/k/a Good Neighbor Eurpoean Deli Market, LLC.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Common Counts/Open Book Account, Breach of Contract and Unjust Enrichment was filed on September 19, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's First Amended Summons & First Amended Complaint on defendants Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, individually, Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba MNM Food Market and Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba Good Neighbor, f/k/a Good Neighbor Eurpoean Deli Market, LLC, occurred on October 10, 2019 and was effectuated on October 20, 2019.
Default as to all three defendants was entered on January 7, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 14, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alex Miretsky, dba Russian Import, and against the defaulted defendants Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, individually, Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba MNM Food Market and Pavel (a/k/a Paul) Moskalets, dba Good Neighbor, f/k/a Good Neighbor Eurpoean Deli Market, LLC, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,125.13.
Prejudgment Interest - $195,502.64.
Attorney Fees - $4,200.00.
Costs - 933.60.

Total - $237,761.37.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
